scope: fixed-time learned-readout qualification separating nonlinear state-derived pair conversion from irreducible coordinate probability-path variance

readout.base_input: frozen v2 all-pair current-state features plus two zero control channels
readout.topology_input: same features plus frozen-probe and quotient-Tweedie coordination probabilities
readout.output: 16 radial scalar coefficients contracted with current all-pair Cartesian vector-RBF and graphwise translation projected

decision_rule.topology_readout_passes: qualify only a separately time-conditioned nonlinear latent-pair field for production integration
decision_rule.base_only_passes: attribute the gap to generic coordinate readout conversion rather than topology and do not add ACF
decision_rule.both_fail: state-derived pair conversion is insufficient; attribute the remaining high-noise residual to conditional variance/probability-path information and do not add another deterministic branch
decision_rule.boundary: This one-seed fixed-time readout is a mechanism qualification, not production training or H1a rescue. It cannot initialize the generator or authorize H1b-H6, tensor condition, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
